info.title: Backlog API
info.description: Backlog is a project management tool by Nulab. The Backlog API (v2) allows you to manage spaces, projects, issues, wikis, users, notifications, and more programmatically. Uses API key or OAuth 2.0 authentication.

get.description: Returns recent updates in the space.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of activities to return (default 20, max 100)

get.description: Returns list of users in the space.
Returns information about a specific user.
Returns information about the authenticated user.
Returns list of projects the authenticated user has access to.

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: Set to true to return all projects (admin only)

get.description: Returns information about a specific project.
Returns list of issues matching the specified criteria.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of issues to return (default 20, max 100)

post.description: Creates a new issue in the specified project.

get.description: Returns information about a specific issue.
Returns list of comments on the specified issue.

post.description: Adds a comment to the specified issue.

get.description: Returns the number of issues matching the criteria.
Returns list of issue types for the project.
Returns list of categories for the project.
Returns list of versions (milestones) for the project.
Returns recent notifications for the authenticated user.
Returns the count of unread notifications.

IssueIdOrKey.name: issueIdOrKey
IssueIdOrKey.description: Issue ID or issue key (e.g., PROJECT-1)
